testcase.name: Transform and load a payload
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Transform and load a payload &amp#27;[90m# features/etl.feature:6&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32man ETL request from &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"crm"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with payload &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m" hello world "&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.project.si.bdd.bdd.steps.EtlStepDefinitions.anEtlRequestFromWithPayload(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe ETL pipeline runs&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.project.si.bdd.bdd.steps.EtlStepDefinitions.theEtlPipelineRuns()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe load result status is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"LOADED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.project.si.bdd.bdd.steps.EtlStepDefinitions.theLoadResultStatusIs(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe stored payload is normalized to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"HELLO WORLD"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.project.si.bdd.bdd.steps.EtlStepDefinitions.theStoredPayloadIsNormalizedTo(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
